shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Activated during sleep hours (12-hour cycle set by player)
context.usage_scenario: Plays continuously during sleep period. Player cannot interact with Echo during this state. Automatically transitions to idle when sleep period ends.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head tucked into feathers, rounded silhouette
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: Head fully tucked into feathers. Frame 2: Body slightly expanded (breathing in). Frame 3: Body slightly contracted (breathing out). Subtle breathing motion.

visual_specification.details: Head completely hidden in feathers - no visible eyes or beak. Crest flattened against head. Body appears more rounded/puffed. Tail visible but drooping slightly. Breathing motion: 1-2px vertical expansion/contraction. ZZZ particle spawns above-right every 2 seconds.

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette and size as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle: head tucked vs upright, eyes hidden vs visible, crest flat vs normal, rounded vs upright posture. All other states show visible head/eyes.

explicit_negations: Eyes not visible (not even closed - fully hidden)
No snoring sound waves (only ZZZ particle)
Body does not sway or move horizontally
